stemHtml:
Refer to figure or E(LO)2 chart from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Given the following information, find the geographical position of the aircraft, if the DME indications are increasing while following a true track of 180°

TALLA (TLA) VOR/DME (55°30N 003°21'W)
TURNBERRY (TRN) VOR/DME (55°19'N 004°47'W)
Aircraft position: 46 NM from TLA and 35 NM from TRN
Disregard slant range corrections
